description: A square graphic. The background is a photograph of a large open landfill of mixed refuse under a hazy sky. In the foreground a portrait of an adult bald man with a gray beard and glasses, wearing a blue athletic shirt, is overlaid with a large red circle-and-slash symbol drawn across him. A black banner across the bottom reads WORST OF THE WORST in white capital letters, with a small U.S. Customs and Border Protection seal and wordmark centered below it.
notable_text: WORST OF THE WORST; U.S. Customs and Border Protection
